mapper.insert: INSERT INTO /*페이인포 최초저장*/ NMCP_PAY_INFO ( BIRTH_DATE, CREATE_YN, CSTMR_NAME, CTN, PAY_SEQ, REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, REQ_BANK, RES_NO , USER_ID) VALUES ( #{birthDate}, #{createYn}, #{cstmrName}, #{ctn}, #{paySeq}, #{reqAccountNumber}, #{reqBank}, #{resNo}, #{userId} )
mapper.select: SELECT /* 변경 신청서 이미지 좌표 */ COLUNM_NAME, META_ROW, META_LINE, CODEDATA_YN, CODEDATA FROM NMCP_PAY_INFO_FORM ORDER BY APP_KEY ASC
SELECT PAY_SEQ, CSTMR_NAME, BIRTH_DATE, CTN, REQ_BANK, REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, RES_NO, CREATE_YN, USER_ID FROM NMCP_PAY_INFO WHERE PAY_SEQ=#{paySeq}
